mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.name as text, s.name as label, s.id as value, s.id_company FROM site as s WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_site FROM site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = ${employee_id} )
AND id_company IN
#{compId}
AND s.`name` LIKE CONCAT("%",#{keyword}, "%")
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_access ( id_user, created_date, updated_date ) VALUES( ${employee_id}, now(), now() );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
mapper.select:
SELECT id, id_user, security_key, status FROM api_access WHERE id_user = ${employee_id}
AND status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_access_company_map (id_api_access, id_company, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )

INSERT INTO api_access_site_map (id_api_access, id_site, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT ac.id, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', s.id, 'text', s.name, 'label', s.name, 'value', s.id, 'company_id', t.id_company, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT acs.id_site, acs.status, s.id_company FROM api_access_site_map acs INNER JOIN site s on s.id = acs.id_site WHERE acs.id_api_access = ac.id AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1 ) t JOIN site s ON s.id = t.id_site ) AS sites, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', c.id, 'text', c.name, 'label', c.name, 'value', c.id, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT acm.id_company, acm.status FROM api_access_company_map acm WHERE acm.id_api_access = ac.id ) t JOIN company c ON c.id = t.id_company ) AS companies
FROM api_access ac WHERE ac.id_user = #{employee_id};
